Metadata.title: Lunatech — Creative technology studio
Metadata.description: Design, technology, and strategy as one digital experience: web, UI/UX, strategy, and performance for brands that stand out.

hero.headline: We build brands that stand out in the digital world
hero.sub: We combine design, technology, and strategy to turn your business into a strong digital experience.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: We don’t just ship products — we design digital experiences.

webExperience.title: Web experiences
webExperience.desc: Modern, fast, user-centred web platforms crafted for your brand.

mobileApp.title: Mobile app development
mobileApp.desc: iOS, Android, and cross-platform mobile apps — from design to App Store launch.

government.title: Government Integrations
government.desc: myGov, SİMA auth, and SİMA digital signing — built into your product.

hero.title: Fast, conversion-focused sites and web platforms
hero.lede: On-brand, mobile-fast, search-friendly sites designed and built to turn visitors into pipeline.

intro.title: Two products, one engineering standard
intro.lede: From marketing sites to SaaS platforms — both built on the same performance, CMS, and design-system foundations.

marketing.title: Marketing sites
marketing.description: Brand, campaign, and landing pages. Editor-friendly CMS, sub-second loads, and SEO foundations included.

platform.title: Web platforms
platform.description: SaaS dashboards, portals, and product apps. Component library, auth, and real-time data ready to go.

cta.title: Let's scope your site or platform
cta.lede: Tell us where you are today and what it needs to do. We'll come back with a plan within two business days.

hero.title: iOS, Android, and cross-platform mobile apps
hero.lede: Native-speed mobile apps that meet App Store and Google Play standards. From concept to your users' hands.

intro.title: Native or cross-platform — matched to your business
intro.lede: Separate native apps for iOS and Android, or one React Native codebase shipping both. The choice depends on your goals.

native.title: Native iOS / Android
native.description: Fully native experience built with Swift and Kotlin. Peak performance, platform-specific UI, and deep system integration.

cross.title: Cross-platform (React Native)
cross.description: One codebase shipping to iOS and Android. Faster launch, shared workflow, and lower maintenance cost.

cta.title: Let's scope your mobile app

hero.title: Government identity system integration
hero.lede: We connect SİMA signing and Digital Login to your product. No in-house developers needed — we own the technical side end to end.

intro.title: Fully managed integration
intro.lede: We add SİMA signing and Digital Login to your website or app without your team writing the code. Backend, API, test, production cutover — all on us.

sima.title: SİMA signing
sima.description: Legally binding digital signature. Sign contracts, documents, and transactions inside your product.

digital.title: Digital Login
digital.description: myGov SSO and SİMA authentication. Citizens sign in with the identity they already have, in seconds.

about.title: About Lunatech
about.p1: Lunatech is a creative team focused on building and evolving digital products.
about.p2: We work at the intersection of design and technology to deliver functional, aesthetic, and lasting solutions for brands.
about.p3: Our goal isn’t just to exist online — it’s to make a difference.

approach.title: Our approach
approach.p1: We look at every project through a strategic lens.
approach.p2: We balance aesthetics and performance to ship products that create real user value.
approach.p3: For us, design isn’t only how it looks — it’s how it works.

process.title: Process
process.discoverDetail: Align on goals, constraints, and audiences before we shape the work.
process.designDetail: Structure, visuals, and interaction — crafted for clarity and conversion.
process.buildDetail: Engineering with polish: performance, accessibility, QA, and resilient delivery.
process.launchDetail: Ship, measure, and iterate with a clear handover and support plan.
process.subtitle: Each phase is planned and transparent.

portfolio.title: Selected work
portfolio.subtitle: Brands and projects we’ve shaped across industries — each one a distinct design problem and approach.
portfolio.demoNote: Sample reference (opens Aura in a new tab)

project1.title: Nebula Commerce
project1.summary: Headless storefront with cinematic product storytelling and scroll-driven narrative.
project1.body: Conversion-led UX, edge performance, modular design system, and motion-led product pages for seasonal campaigns.

project2.title: Pulse Fintech
project2.summary: Real-time portfolio experience with motion-led onboarding for trust.
project2.body: Biometric flows, accessible data visualization, and animated states that reinforce security and clarity.

project3.title: Aura Lifestyle
project3.summary: Wellness app with habit loops, glass UI, and retention-focused craft.
project3.body: Habit design, layered interface depth, and localized content strategy across multiple markets.

project4.title: Vertex AI Console
project4.summary: Operator tools for ML pipelines — dense UI, still readable in motion.
project4.body: Terminal-native patterns, role-based workspaces, and latency-aware live charts.

project5.title: Lunar Rebrand
project5.summary: Full identity for a space-tech hardware startup — including motion logo.
project5.body: Wordmark, animated identity, and component library aligned with manufacturing partners.

project6.title: Signal Launch Film
project6.summary: Product reveal and social cutdowns — shader-led hero and modular story beats.
project6.body: Real-time visuals, audio-reactive teasers, and paid-media-ready modular storytelling.

contact.title: Let’s build something powerful together
